---
title: "Bayesian Logistic Regression"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-04-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries}

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(rstanarm)
set.seed(33)
```

```{r}
df <- read_csv("nsi_MA.csv")

high_risk_zones <- c("VE", "AE", "A", "AO", "AH")
df$target_label <- as.integer(df$firmzone %in% high_risk_zones)

num_cols <- c("ground_elv", "found_ht", "val_struct", "med_yr_blt", "sqft", "num_story")
cat_cols <- c("bldgtype", "found_type")

df_features <- df[c(num_cols, cat_cols, 'target_label')]

df_features
```

```{r}
split_idx <- floor(0.8 * nrow(df_features))
train_df <- df_features[1:split_idx, ]
test_df <- df_features[(split_idx + 1):nrow(df_features), ]

X_mean <- colMeans(train_df[num_cols])
X_std <- apply(train_df[num_cols], 2, sd)

train_df[num_cols] <- sweep(as.matrix(train_df[num_cols]), 2, X_mean, "-")
train_df[num_cols] <- sweep(as.matrix(train_df[num_cols]), 2, X_std + 1e-8, "/")
test_df[num_cols] <- sweep(as.matrix(test_df[num_cols]),  2, X_mean, "-")
test_df[num_cols] <- sweep(as.matrix(test_df[num_cols]),  2, X_std + 1e-8, "/")
```

```{r}
blr_model <- stan_glm(
  target_label ~ .,          
  data = train_df,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"), 
  prior = normal(0, 2.5),          
  prior_intercept = normal(0, 10),   
  chains = 4,              
  iter = 1000,        
  warmup = 500,          
  cores = 4,            
  seed = 33,
  refresh = 200
)

```

```{r}
print(summary(blr_model, probs = c(0.025, 0.975)))
```

```{r}
post_probs <- posterior_epred(blr_model, newdata = test_df)
pred_mean <- colMeans(post_probs)
predictions <- as.integer(pred_mean > 0.5)

Y_test <- test_df$target_label
tp <- sum(predictions == 1 & Y_test == 1)
tn <- sum(predictions == 0 & Y_test == 0)
fp <- sum(predictions == 1 & Y_test == 0)
fn <- sum(predictions == 0 & Y_test == 1)
accuracy <- mean(predictions == Y_test)
precision <- ifelse((tp + fp) > 0, tp / (tp + fp), 0)
recall <- ifelse((tp + fn) > 0, tp / (tp + fn), 0)
f1 <- ifelse((precision + recall) > 0, 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall), 0)

cat(sprintf("Accuracy:%.2f%%\n", accuracy * 100))
cat(sprintf("Precision:%.2f%%\n", precision * 100))
cat(sprintf("Recall:%.2f%%\n", recall * 100))
cat(sprintf("F1 Score:%.4f\n", f1))

```

```{r}
post_draws <- as.data.frame(blr_model)

coef_cols <- setdiff(colnames(post_draws), c("(Intercept)", "sigma"))
coef_means <- colMeans(post_draws[, coef_cols])

coef_means <- sort(coef_means, decreasing = FALSE)
top10 <- tail(coef_means[order(abs(coef_means))], 10)
top10_df <- data.frame(feature = names(top10), mean = as.numeric(top10))

coef_plot <- ggplot(top10_df, aes(x = mean, y = reorder(feature, mean))) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Feature Coefficients",
    x = "Posterior Mean Coefficient",
    y = "Feature"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(coef_plot)
```

```{r}
top6_names <- names(sort(abs(coef_means), decreasing = TRUE))[1:6]


top6_draws <- post_draws[, top6_names]
plot_df <- data.frame(
  feature = rep(top6_names, each = nrow(top6_draws)),
  value = unlist(top6_draws, use.names = FALSE)
)

coef_dist <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = value, fill = feature)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.7, color = "white") +
  facet_wrap(~ feature, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             color = "gray40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 6 Features's Posterior Distributions",
    subtitle = "4000 posterior draws of that coefficient",
    x = "Coefficient value",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

print(coef_dist)
```
